class_type.description:
The senses are our gateway into perceiving and experiencing our surroundings, each other and this world. Each of them is an absolute miracle, though they have become blunted by our modern lifestyle. Together, we will ignite our senses one by one to become fully immersed in the gratitude of our present awareness.

Expect a sauna to sweat, ice bath to drop-in, towel waving, aromatherapy, gentle breathwork, sound healing instruments, periods of complete darkness, sharing and guided meditation.
class_type.name: Guided Down: Senses

instructors.bio:
Why do you guide at Othership?
I guide to share my own magic while witnessing the wild, mysterious power within others—curating moments where we can meet discomfort and fear with ease, trust, and even joy as a community. Together, we breathe into our complex lives to invite deeper wholeness and integration with the natural flow of things.

What makes your style of guidance unique?
My style is rooted in playfulness, tenderness, and deep curiosity, co-creating with the space, the moment, and the collective energy in the room. I hold space like an ecosystem, allowing individual and group needs to emerge naturally while keeping channels open and cycles flowing.
instructors.name: Maggie Scrantom

class_type.description:
Cultivate resilience and explore the thrilling edge of aliveness with three rounds of guided ice baths, followed by gentle movement and restorative heat. A social experience that offers a unique opportunity to redefine your connection to the cold an unleash your inner power.

Expect a sauna to sweat, multiple ice baths to drop-in, light movement, towel waving, guided breathwork, intention setting, sharing and loud vocal release.
class_type.name: Guided Up: Arctic Tundra - 60 min

instructors.bio:
Why do you guide at Othership?
I guide to create safe, supportive spaces where people can release what no longer serves them and reconnect with their most authentic selves. Building meaningful community and guiding others toward inner trust and self-awareness is at the heart of my purpose.

What makes your style of guidance unique?
I bring a peaceful, grounding energy that helps Journeyers feel truly seen and safe to express themselves fully. My sessions are designed to make deep transformation feel natural, accessible, and rooted in self-acceptance.
instructors.name: Kat Radka

class_type.description:
Consider this guided journey a new form of happiness workout. Through a unique combination of guided practices we will uplift your spirits, cultivate resilience and steer your emotional state towards a serene, happy equilibrium.

Expect a sauna to sweat, ice bath to drop-in, towel waving, aromatherapy, breathwork, guided affirmations, sharing, tapping and self-inquiry.
class_type.name: Guided All Around: Hardwiring Happiness

instructors.bio:
Why do you guide at Othership?
I guide to help others reconnect with their inner voice and the shared humanity that comes alive through heat, cold, and breath. It’s a gift to witness people drop into authenticity, presence, and simple, natural joy—with just a reminder to breathe.

What makes your style of guidance unique?
With a background in performance, I blend humor, warmth, and groundedness to create a space where people feel safe to be fully themselves. My sessions balance depth with lightness, inviting real connection without taking things too seriously.
instructors.name: Daniel Deist

class_type.description:
Experience deep release and relaxation as you unwind tension and enhance your range of motion. This tranquil class merges the healing properties of heat with thoughtfully curated stretching and mobility techniques to enhance your well-being.

Expect a sauna to sweat, ice bath to drop-in, towel waving, stretching, gentle breathwork, aromatherapy, sharing and towel waving.
class_type.name: Guided Down: Embodied

class_type.description:
Let the warmth envelop you as we indulge in this rejuvenating journey of self-care and appreciation for our bodies. Rediscover your inner radiance and naturally nurture your body through this immersive, cleansing experience. 

Expect a sauna to sweat, ice bath to drop-in, towel waving, aromatherapy, lymphatic drainage, Gua-sha, essential oil infused face towels, sharing and self-massage.
class_type.name: Guided Up: Self-Care Sweat

instructors.bio:
Why do you guide at Othership?
I guide to create safe, supportive spaces where people can release what no longer serves them and reconnect with their most authentic selves. Building meaningful community and guiding others toward inner trust and self-awareness is at the heart of my purpose.

What makes your style of guidance unique?
I bring a peaceful, grounding energy that helps Journeyers feel truly seen and safe to express themselves fully. My sessions are designed to make deep transformation feel natural, accessible, and rooted in self-acceptance.
instructors.name: Kat Radka

class_type.description:
An invitation to nurture a profound state of mind—cultivating loving-kindness for ourselves and all living beings. This guided journey is a gateway to discovering a deeper sense of compassion and kindness within.

Expect a sauna to sweat, ice bath to drop-in, towel waving, aromatherapy, breathwork, self inquiry, eye gazing, periods of complete darkness, sharing and guided connection.
class_type.name: Guided All Around: Loving Kindness

instructors.bio:
Why do you guide at Othership?
From the moment I discovered Othership, I knew it aligned with everything I had been practicing and dreaming of bringing to the city. As a wellness coach and yogi, guiding here lets me share the powerful benefits of heat, cold, aroma, and expression with journeyers of all levels.

What makes your style of guidance unique?
I guide as an emotional alchemist, blending sound, movement, and meditation to help others explore and transform their inner worlds. My voice and presence create a safe space for deep emotional release, allowing every feeling to be honored and transmuted into renewed energy.
instructors.name: M.E. Gonzo

class_type.description:
Embark on a 75-minute self-guided journey to explore the sauna to sweat, ice baths to drop-in and a commons to be yourself with others.

During Free Flows you have the freedom to chart your own course through the elements, while our experienced Guides are available for those seeking one-on-one support.

Expect all of the elements that make our journey a memorable one: towel waving, aromatherapy, playful sauna landings, 1:1 guidance, curated soundscape and human connection.

Consider our Free Flows an opportunity to land at Othership and shift states in collective ways.
class_type.name: Free Flow

class_type.description: Embark on a social 75-minute journey to explore the sauna to sweat, ice baths to drop-in and a commons to be yourself with others. During Lively Free Flows you have the freedom to chart your own course through the elements, while our experienced Guides are available for those seeking one-on-one support. Expect all of the elements that make our journey a memorable one: towel waving, aromatherapy, playful sauna landings, 1:1 guidance and curated soundscape, plus palpable human connection and social energy. Consider our Lively Free Flows an opportunity to land at Othership and shift states in collective ways.

class_type.description:
Dive into this sonic sweat to discover the resonance of your authentic self. When we synchronize with ourselves and others, we unlock a state of flow, enabling us to lead our most harmonious lives.

Expect a sauna to sweat, ice bath to drop-in, towel waving, aromatherapy, breathwork, vocal toning, periods of complete darkness, sharing and sound healing instruments.
class_type.name: Guided All Around: Sound Immersion

instructors.bio:
Why do you guide at Othership?
I’m deeply committed to creating safe, authentic spaces where people feel truly seen, heard, and connected—offering a refuge from the overstimulation of city life to drop fully into presence. Having experienced healing through breathwork, mindfulness, and embodiment myself, guiding allows me to share these transformative tools that support resilience and nervous system regulation.

What makes your style of guidance unique?
I embody a wide emotional range—from grounded reflection to energetic hype—leading people on meaningful journeys of liberation and restoration. With a background in theater, sound healing, and professional singing, I enhance the experience by integrating live soundscapes that nourish the body and mind, creating truly immersive moments.
instructors.name: Sharisse Francisco

class_type.description:
Let the warmth envelop you as we indulge in this rejuvenating journey of self-care and appreciation for our bodies. Rediscover your inner radiance and naturally nurture your body through this immersive, cleansing experience. 

Expect a sauna to sweat, ice bath to drop-in, towel waving, aromatherapy, lymphatic drainage, Gua-sha, essential oil infused face towels, sharing and self-massage.
class_type.name: Guided Down: Self-Care Sweat

class_type.description:
Consider this our icy-fresh take on an evening out with friends. A 2-hour sober-curious gathering to connect with others over a shared sauna + ice bath experience.

Harness the collective energy of like-minded journeyers to drop your guard and express your most authentic self. Together, we unite to shift our state and build belonging from a place of open receptivity. 

Expect all of the elements that make our journey a memorable one: towel waving, aromatherapy, louder music, dancing, impromptu sauna landings, 1:1 guidance, curated soundscape, human connection and big TGIF energy.
class_type.name: Social
